name: Perimeter Solutions, Inc.
business: Perimeter Solutions provides fire retardants and suppressants for wildfire, industrial, and structural firefighting, along with related equipment and services, primarily to U.S. government agencies. It also produces phosphorus pentasulfide (P2S5) for lubricant additives and emerging battery technologies, and electronic components for communications, energy, defense, and industrial markets. In January 2026, it acquired MMT, adding highly engineered machinery for medical device manufacturing.

exposures.sentence: Our business is organized and managed in two reporting segments: Fire Safety and Specialty Products.

The Specialty Products segment includes Phosphorus Derivatives, Inc., which produces Phosphorus Pentasulfide ( P 2 S 5 ) based lubricant additives. P 2 S 5 is also used in pesticide and mining chemicals applications, and emerging electric battery technologies.

We completed the acquisition of MMT in January 2026, and we expect that MMT will be part of our Specialty Products Segment. MMT provides highly engineered machinery and associated aftermarket consumables, parts, and services to support the production of complex medical devices as well as select highly engineered industrial and aerospace and defense use cases.

The Specialty Products segment also includes Intelligent Manufacturing Solutions ( IMS ), which is a manufacturer of electronic or electro-mechanical components of larger solutions. IMS has a flexible, vertically integrated production facility that allows it to acquire and produce a variety of product lines across a range of end markets, including communications infrastructure, energy infrastructure, defense systems, and industrial systems, with a substantial focus on aftermarket repair and replacement.

The Specialty Products segment also includes Intelligent Manufacturing Solutions ( IMS ), which is a manufacturer of electronic or electro-mechanical components of larger solutions. IMS has a flexible, vertically integrated production facility that allows it to acquire and produce a variety of product lines across a range of end markets, including communications infrastructure, energy infrastructure, defense systems, and industrial systems, with a substantial focus on aftermarket repair and replacement.

IMS has a flexible, vertically integrated production facility that allows it to acquire and produce a variety of product lines across a range of end markets, including communications infrastructure, energy infrastructure, defense systems, and industrial systems, with a substantial focus on aftermarket repair and replacement.

The Specialty Products segment also includes Intelligent Manufacturing Solutions ( IMS ), which is a manufacturer of electronic or electro-mechanical components of larger solutions. IMS has a flexible, vertically integrated production facility that allows it to acquire and produce a variety of product lines across a range of end markets, including communications infrastructure, energy infrastructure, defense systems, and industrial systems, with a substantial focus on aftermarket repair and replacement.

The Specialty Products segment also includes Intelligent Manufacturing Solutions ( IMS ), which is a manufacturer of electronic or electro-mechanical components of larger solutions. IMS has a flexible, vertically integrated production facility that allows it to acquire and produce a variety of product lines across a range of end markets, including communications infrastructure, energy infrastructure, defense systems, and industrial systems, with a substantial focus on aftermarket repair and replacement.
P 2 S 5 is also used in pesticide and mining chemicals applications, and emerging electric battery technologies.
As more electric vehicles emerge on the automobile market, use of the internal combustion engine may decline, thereby lessening demand for some of our specialty products.

catalysts.event: Five-year agreement with USDA Forest Service and Bureau of Land Management
catalysts.sentence: In September 2025, we entered into a five-year agreement covering products and services provided to the USDA Forest Service and the U.S. Bureau of Land Management by our Fire Safety Segment.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Medical Manufacturing Technologies (MMT) closed
catalysts.sentence: We completed the acquisition of MMT in January 2026, and we expect that MMT will be part of our Specialty Products Segment.

catalysts.event: Issuance of $550 million 6.250% senior secured notes due 2034
catalysts.sentence: On January 2, 2026, Perimeter Holdings, LLC ( Perimeter Holdings ), an indirect wholly owned subsidiary of the Company, completed its offering of $550 million in aggregate principal amount of 6.250% senior secured notes due 2034.

catalysts.event: Board re-established share repurchase limit at $100 million
catalysts.sentence: On August 6, 2025, the Board re-established the limit for Common Stock repurchases at $100.0 million.

catalysts.event: New fire retardant production facility opened in McClellan Park, California
catalysts.sentence: The McClellan Park location was opened in 2025 and serves as a major hub for production and distribution, supporting our ability to deliver fire retardant to airbases in North America within hours.

catalysts.event: Entered into amended and restated revolving credit facility
catalysts.sentence: On December 19, 2025, a wholly owned subsidiary of the Company entered into a credit agreement for its five-year revolving credit facility.
